target.label: Loopback-bound port publication + opt-in KEEL_DEVBOX_SSH sshd

rationale: Epic-2-substrate-sshd-opt-in-compose-override class story (TWELFTH Epic 2 delivery; FIRST story combining (i) NEW compose-override file resolution pattern + (ii) long-running-background-daemon-in-entrypoint + (iii) stateful-first-boot-named-volume-init with atomic scratch-dir-then-mv-T host-key generation — distinct from Stories 2.1-2.11 single-file-compose-pattern extensions) shipping 1 NEW authoritative invariant doc under `docs/invariants/devbox-ssh.md` (contentHash `e1d693cb0ffa0c7c8d6966b8ce311c2e1daf13d83155d8a0b88028d96112a3c2`) + 1 NEW `INV-devbox-ssh` manifest entry (32nd manifest entry; THIRD new manifest entry in Epic 2 story-scoped surface after Story 2.10's `INV-devbox-prereq-check` at 29th and Story 2.11's `INV-devbox-mode` at 30th — wait, 31st given the iter-264 AR-91 drift: per `packages/keel-invariants/src/invariants.manifest.ts` scanned at iter-268 the pre-Story-2.12 count was 31 and Story 2.12 brings it to 32) + 1 NEW `packages/devbox/sshd/sshd_config` hardened baked-at-image-build-time template (NEW directory `packages/devbox/sshd/` — first occupant; mirrors Story 2.3 `packages/devbox/dnsmasq/` + `packages/devbox/nftables/` template-directory convention) + 1 NEW `packages/devbox/docker-compose.ssh.yml` compose override (SINGLE site publishing port 2222 per SC-3) + `resolve_ssh_state()` 32-LOC net-new function appended to `packages/devbox/scripts/lib/main-repo-resolver.sh` (sibling to Story 2.11's `resolve_mode_specific_state()` — composes sequentially after the Story 2.11 resolver) + `packages/devbox/entrypoint.sh` conditional block (~46-LOC) with first-boot atomic host-key generation + idempotent perm enforcement + backgrounded `gosu dev /usr/sbin/sshd -D -e` with post-spawn liveness check (non-fatal per SC-10 background-process-lifecycle contract) + 15 host-side shim wire-ins across 8 compose-invoking scripts (build 1 + rebuild 1 + start 1 + stop 1 + status 1 + logs 2 + clean 2 + benchmark 6) via the `${KEEL_DEVBOX_COMPOSE_FILE_SSH:+-f "${KEEL_DEVBOX_COMPOSE_FILE_SSH}"}` conditional-expansion idiom avoiding RALPH.md 2026-04-21 AR-9 iterable-word-splitting hazards + Dockerfile apt-layer `openssh-server` package (Renovate apt-manager-tracked per Story 1.15) + sshd_config `COPY` + `/home/dev/.ssh/host_keys/` pre-creation mode 0700 owner dev:dev + docker-compose.yml `environment:` block extension with `KEEL_DEVBOX_SSH: ${KEEL_DEVBOX_SSH:-false}` propagation (SC-9: compose's `${VAR}` interpolation runs on the HOST at parse time; without explicit `environment:` propagation the container sees empty env-var) + TODO marker removal at L259 + Story 2.12 LANDED roadmap line at L24 + 1 NEW `INVARIANTS.md` H3 section `### Devbox SSH (Story 2.12)` with anchor bullet inserted between Story 2.11 `### Devbox mode` and Story 2.2 `### Gitignored-secret commit-deny` H3s (devbox H3 sequence is non-numerical per iter-266 verification) + 1 NEW README H2 `## Opt-in SSH (Story 2.12)` sibling-append between Story 2.11 `## Per-fork vs shared devbox mode` H2 and `## cc-devbox upstream provenance` H2 with three operator walkthroughs (default no-SSH / opt-in sshd / authorized-keys flow) + mode-flip note + external refusal explanation + cross-references + 1 NEW AGENTS.md H3 `### Opt-in SSH (Story 2.12)` sibling-append between Story 2.11 H3 and `## Ralph loop` H2 with agent guardrails covering loopback-bound invariant + resolver idiom + compose-override single-site + token persistence + re-auth pointer + ListenAddress rationale + mode-flip discipline + no-CAP_NET_BIND_SERVICE note + scope carve-outs + 1 `.envrc.example:40` SC-15 past-tense comment update. Five ACs — all P2 per FR14n Epic-2-substrate precedent (Stories 2.1-2.11 uniform P2; Story 2.12 preserves the pattern). TWENTY-SECOND cumulative trace-WAIVED precedent extending Story 2.11 iter-258 twenty-first (Stories 1.7 iter-4 + 1.8 iter-3 + 1.9 iter-3 + 1.10 iter-46 + 1.11 iter-57 + 1.12 iter-64 + 1.13 iter-71 + 1.14 iter-78 + 1.15 iter-85 + 1.16 iter-92 → 2.1 iter-126 → 2.2 iter-149 → 2.3 iter-159 → 2.4 iter-175 → 2.5 iter-188 → 2.6 iter-202 → 2.7 iter-224 → 2.8 iter-231 → 2.9 iter-242 → 2.10 iter-249 → 2.11 iter-258 → 2.12 iter-269 = TWENTY-SECOND cumulative trace-WAIVED; TWENTY-THIRD ATDD-skip-trace-WAIVED pairing overall). Ground-(a)+(b)+(c) hybrid conjunction with operator-workstation-deferred-AC-completion for ACs 4-5. (a) substrate-verification covers AC 1 + AC 2 + AC 3 at the substrate layer via 5 iter-268 impl-time smokes: (i) sha256sum docs/invariants/devbox-ssh.md matches manifest contentHash e1d693cb0ffa0c7c8d6966b8ce311c2e1daf13d83155d8a0b88028d96112a3c2; (ii) pnpm --filter @keel/keel-invariants build && pnpm keel-invariants:check GREEN post manifest rebuild with INV-devbox-ssh registered as 32nd entry (iter-257 NOVEL LESSON reaffirmed at iter-268: manifest rebuild MUST precede sync-gate verification); (iii) bash -n syntax-check clean on 10 modified shell scripts (entrypoint.sh, main-repo-resolver.sh, build.sh, rebuild.sh, start.sh, stop.sh, status.sh, logs.sh, clean.sh, benchmark.sh); (iv) resolve_ssh_state normalisation smoke 9/9 green — KEEL_DEVBOX_SSH=true/TrUe/TRUE → resolved `true` + absolute compose-override path; KEEL_DEVBOX_SSH=false/yes/1/on/empty/unset/garbage → resolved `false` + empty string (strict-true-only per SC-2 mirroring Story 2.11 KEEL_DEVBOX_SHARED idiom at lib/main-repo-resolver.sh:152); (v) js-yaml parse + shape assertions on both compose files: base.services.devbox.ports = 4 Story-2.2 loopback-bound entries + base.services.devbox.environment.KEEL_DEVBOX_SSH = `${KEEL_DEVBOX_SSH:-false}` + override.services.devbox.ports = 1 loopback-bound entry `'127.0.0.1:${KEEL_DEVBOX_SSH_PORT:-2222}:2222'`. (b) no test runner wired at Story 2.12 substrate stage — recursive probe at iter-269 for vitest.config.*/jest.config.*/playwright.config.*/cypress.config.*/pyproject.toml/go.mod/Gemfile/Cargo.toml returns zero matches; tests/ directories present only under .claude/skills/bmad-*/scripts/tests/ (BMad skill internals, not application tests under packages/); Epic 13 delivers framework landing per twenty-two precedents. (c) HYBRID variant-(ii) operator-workstation-deferred-AC-completion for ACs 4-5 — ACs 4-5 live verification requires real Docker daemon + real SSH client + real peer machine (AC 4 non-loopback LAN peer refusal) + real named-volume lifecycle including image rebuild (AC 5 pubkey flow persistence). TWENTY-SECOND CUMULATIVE TRACE-WAIVED PRECEDENT — TWELFTH Epic-2 trace-WAIVED + FIRST Epic-2-substrate-sshd-opt-in-compose-override class trace-WAIVED. Structural trace-artefact inheritance from Story 2.11 (~80% reasoning-cost savings per iter-258 template; mechanical adaptation to 2.12's 5-AC sshd-opt-in class with 4 new files + 32-LOC resolver + ~46-LOC entrypoint + 15 shim wire-ins + 1 new INV; comparable inheritance percentage to Story 2.11's from Story 2.10 given both stories introduce THREE novel-surface vectors — Story 2.11's were dual-mode-resolver + compose-project-parameterisation + env-check-stderr-warning; Story 2.12's are compose-override file + background-daemon-in-entrypoint + stateful-first-boot-keygen). Iteration-env-safe smokes ALL 5 PASSED at iter-268 via direct substrate probes of the sources-of-truth (resolver + manifest sync-gate + bash syntax + YAML shapes + sha256 contentHash). Live docker port + pgrep sshd + LAN peer refusal + pubkey-auth full flow + image-rebuild persistence are backend-A-only operator-workstation-deferred per § Testing Standards ground-(c).
